description: Loket-native Telegram channel adapter — a dumb pipe that forwards each message to a target agent over the loket bus and relays the reply. Handles text AND voice notes (voice → router STT → agent → router TTS → spoken reply). Idle (no polling) until a bot token is set, so it loads safely beside the legacy telegram daemon.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: boot
exposes_rpc.description: Live daemon: long-poll Telegram, forward each allowed message to the target agent over the bus, relay the reply. Idle (clean exit) without a token.

exposes_rpc.name: handle_update
exposes_rpc.description: Process ONE synthetic update (testable core): forward {text,chat_id,user,target} to the agent over the bus and return the reply. send:true relays to Telegram when a token is set.

exposes_rpc.name: handle_voice
exposes_rpc.description: Testable voice core: take base64 audio, transcribe via the router STT, forward the transcript to the agent over the bus, and (speak:true) synthesize the reply via the router TTS. Returns {transcript, reply, audio_b64}. Exercises the full voice pipe with no live bot.
